title: Switching Users - Keeping data
excerpt:
Hi, we’ve had a change of employees and need to set up a new user, taking over from the previous.

posts.author: Sanper (Tom Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we’ve had a change of employees and need to set up a new user, taking over from the previous.
How can I replace 1 user with another, keeping the workspace and data for them to work from? - effectively handing over the account to a new user.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you change the initial users email address?

posts.author: Sanper (Tom Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the response! Yes, I found out shortly after creating a new user and porting all of the data over, that it was as simple as changing the email address. Lesson learned.
